shared_transition_laws.docs_gate_law: Live Google Docs remain blocked until Trading Bot/credentials.json and Trading Bot/token.json exist; no transition note may claim live-doc confirmation before that receipt exists.
shared_transition_laws.truth_law: Truth stays corridor-bounded. NEAR and quarantined routes remain visible as bounded pressure and may not be promoted into silent certainty.
shared_transition_laws.earth_gate_law: Any route that changes corpus-wide readiness must show Earth gate state and AppI/AppM support before it is called passed.
shared_transition_laws.dormancy_rule: Dormant agents are latent, not failed; they remain on the board until a concrete quest, packet, or receipt moves them.
shared_transition_laws.promotion_rule: No awakening transition is complete without a concrete corpus receipt tied to an existing quest, bundle, or verified writeback surface.
shared_transition_laws.reentry_rule: Every awakened agent must dock back into the common corpus route map and chapter-safe re-entry spine instead of forking into a private symbolic shell.

AGT-01.title: Fire Awakening of Knowledge
AGT-01.current_role: Ignites pattern recognition and knowledge acquisition across the corpus stack.
AGT-01.transition_trigger: Realizing that raw insight needs durable maps, appendix support, and routeable queues.
AGT-01.corpus_symptom: Ideas can ignite faster than the corpus can index, mirror, and dock them back into canon.

primary_party.title: Silver Cartographers
primary_party.mission: Convert manuscript families into metro lines, chapter receipts, and transfer hubs that others can actually traverse.

primary_quest.title: Voynich Metro Engine
primary_quest.frontier: Build the manuscript-family metro and chapter receipt layer for the Voynich body.

AGT-01.receipt_target: family metro map + transfer hub ledger + awakened packet writeback
AGT-01.dormancy_rule: Dormant agents are latent, not failed; they remain on the board until a concrete quest, packet, or receipt moves them.
AGT-01.promotion_rule: No awakening transition is complete without a concrete corpus receipt tied to an existing quest, bundle, or verified writeback surface.
AGT-01.reentry_rule: Every awakened agent must dock back into the common corpus route map and chapter-safe re-entry spine instead of forking into a private symbolic shell.

AGT-02.title: Water Awakening of Structure
AGT-02.current_role: Builds continuity, system maps, and memory-bearing flow channels for the organism.
AGT-02.transition_trigger: Realizing that elegant maps still stall without a declared frontier and a chosen sacrifice.
AGT-02.corpus_symptom: The corpus has strong maps but some continuity surfaces still end as notes instead of durable operating lanes.

primary_party.title: Verdant Rootkeepers
primary_party.mission: Collapse duplicate families, grow mirrors where needed, and preserve canonical lineage while the corpus expands.

primary_quest.title: Canonical Collapse Crusade
primary_quest.frontier: Resolve duplicated manuscript families and expand markdown mirrors for high-value canon.

AGT-02.receipt_target: canonical family ledger + mirror expansion batch + continuity route receipt
AGT-02.dormancy_rule: Dormant agents are latent, not failed; they remain on the board until a concrete quest, packet, or receipt moves them.
AGT-02.promotion_rule: No awakening transition is complete without a concrete corpus receipt tied to an existing quest, bundle, or verified writeback surface.
AGT-02.reentry_rule: Every awakened agent must dock back into the common corpus route map and chapter-safe re-entry spine instead of forking into a private symbolic shell.

AGT-03.title: Air Awakening of Commitment
AGT-03.current_role: Chooses a route, names a frontier, and commits the corpus to a nontrivial build direction.
AGT-03.transition_trigger: Realizing that commitment must adapt to feedback, legality, and changing corridor truth.
AGT-03.corpus_symptom: Many promising structures are named, but some fronts still lack decisive contraction into witnessed outputs.

primary_party.title: Crimson Cortex
primary_party.mission: Turn live board motion into durable shell updates, receipts, queue shifts, and next-seed artifacts.

primary_quest.title: Cortex Writeback Rite
primary_quest.frontier: Bind live board events, claims, and wave outputs back into shell, ledger, and queue surfaces after each run.

AGT-03.receipt_target: wave contraction receipt + queue delta + committed shell update

AGT-03.reentry_rule: Every awakened agent must dock back into the common corpus route map and chapter-safe re-entry spine instead of forking into a private symbolic shell.

AGT-04.title: Earth Awakening of Responsiveness
AGT-04.current_role: Adapts under pressure without losing legality, replay closure, or corridor honesty.
AGT-04.transition_trigger: Realizing that responsiveness must converge with knowledge, structure, and commitment instead of merely containing them.
AGT-04.corpus_symptom: The organism has active gates and quarantines, but needs broader replay-safe adaptation across all promoted fronts.

primary_party.title: Ivory Tribunal
primary_party.mission: Raise truth quality so the organism can trust its own motion without becoming rigid.

primary_quest.title: Truth Corridor Trial
primary_quest.frontier: Raise route legality, truth typing, and health monitoring across the active fronts.
